channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts

item.title: Bitcoin eyeing a last sprint to 82K, then a sharp fade to 68K. Bulls, beware: the setup looks risky as momentum fades. 🛑 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260417-prediction-bitcoin-targets-82k-in-next-10-days #btc #bitcoin #crypto
